projects.name: wxops
projects.tagline: Webex Calling playbook — wxcli CLI, agents, CDR/reporting, MCP server.
projects.description: Programmatic Webex Calling administration: provisioning, routing, devices, contact center, reporting, billing, and CUCM migration.
routingTasks: Webex Calling admin (users, devices, routing, queues, CDR, billing)

projects.name: vidcastmcp
projects.tagline: Vidcast MCP — recordings, playlists, transcripts via OAuth.
projects.description: Connects Claude to the Webex Vidcast MCP server with 29 tools for searching, browsing, and retrieving recordings, playlists, and transcripts.

projects.name: device-mcp-server
projects.tagline: RoomOS xAPI control for Webex devices (Cursor roomos MCP).
projects.description: Control RoomOS endpoints via Cloud API — dial, hold, mute, camera presets, standby, and xAPI commands.
projects.runCommand: cd ~/Documents/GitHub/test/device-mcp-server && npm run build && node dist/index.js

projects.name: scrapeweb
projects.tagline: BFS web crawler → structured JSON per page.
projects.description: Crawl a website breadth-first and export rich structured page data — headings, links, tables — to JSON.

projects.name: Lookback
projects.description: OCR Control Hub (or any card-based) dashboard screenshots into structured Excel metrics with confidence scoring.
routingTasks: OCR Control Hub screenshots to Excel

projects.name: my-orchestrator
projects.tagline: Meta-MCP — discover other MCP servers on the machine.
projects.description: Lets an LLM discover and read READMEs of other MCP servers without connecting to them directly.

projects.name: check-back-intelligence
projects.tagline: Customer adoption analytics — PDFs → Check Back spreadsheet → dashboard.
projects.description: Track whether Webex customers use what they pay for. Populate Check Back workbooks from PDFs/screenshots and explore adoption health in an interactive dashboard.

projects.name: test
projects.tagline: Experiments — OCR bot and integration subprojects.
projects.description: Mixed experiments including a Webex space bot that OCRs dashboard screenshots and appends rows to Excel.

projects.name: GenAI-Bootcamp
projects.tagline: Three-day GenAI curriculum and lab materials.
projects.description: 3-day GenAI bootcamp covering HuggingFace, OpenAI, RAG, and LLM app deployment with hands-on labs.

projects.name: CTFMonopoly
projects.description: Monopoly-style CTF-themed browser game. No backend — open and play locally.

projects.name: Autonomous-Ai-drone-scripts
projects.tagline: Jetson Nano autonomous drone and person-following stack.
projects.description: Autonomous drone navigation and person-following on Jetson Nano using MobileNet, LiDAR, and PID control with ArduPilot/Pixhawk.

routing.task: Webex Calling admin (users, devices, routing, queues, CDR, billing)
